title: Safety & Health Committee
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable safety programme for strengthening awareness and practice in safety & health committee.
whyThisMatters: Safety & Health Committee helps workplace teams recognize hazards, apply controls, and make safety & health committee part of everyday operations. Participants explore Explain contractor health and safety performance review requirements, Legal requirements in safety and health regulations, and Accident Prevention and Management of Safety so safety expectations become easier to understand, discuss, and act on.
builtFor: Employees in operational, site-based, or technical roles
Supervisors responsible for daily safety practices
Teams that need stronger safety awareness and prevention habits
walkAwayWith: Recognize relevant workplace hazards and risk factors earlier.
Apply safer work practices and basic control measures.
Understand individual responsibility in safety, health, or environmental performance.
Support better reporting, prevention, and follow-through at work.

modules.title: Explain contractor health and safety performance review requirements
Legal requirements in safety and health regulations
Accident Prevention and Management of Safety

methodologyCaption: The workshop uses workplace examples, discussion, and practical hazard-recognition activities to make safe behavior concrete.
